title: Too Many Swords
description: Swords that shouldn't be in Minecraft.
body:
Description
-
This mod adds 12 more swords to Minecraft, of which 11 are survival-obtainable and 1 is creative only.

Each sword also has unique abilities :D

Dedicated YouTube Video
-
https://youtu.be/2RTk-WLKUkA

Here's Some Example Swords (more see wiki page):
- 

- Cactus Sword
  - It pricks you. Yes. It pricks you until either you die or you stop using it.
- Glass Sword
  - 20% chance of summoning lightning, low durability tho(cause its glass)
- Water Sword
  - Acts like a water bucket except it is not reusable
- Lava Sword
  - Water sword but lava
- Ice Sword
  - Freezes and traps target/victim in ice
- Snow Sword
  - Freezes target/victim in powdered snow
- Fire Sword
  - Acts like flint and steel
- Redstone Sword
  - Heals you
- Lapis Sword
  - Gives you experience points every hit
- *Missing Sword*
  - *This is a creative only sword with 10 durability, it sends targets to the abyss*
- Obsidian Sword/Harder Stone Sword
  - No unique abilities
